message:
refactor(hostcall): log-sinking batch planner, generation-keyed ghost cache, FIFO scheduler

Hostcall AMAC batch executor (hostcall_amac.rs):
- Rewrite plan_batch() to use contiguous-run grouping instead of
  BTreeMap aggregation, preserving global request ordering across
  groups (was losing inter-group order when merging by key).
- Add \"log sinking\" optimization: buffer Log hostcalls and flush
  them between non-log groups, preventing interleaving of log calls
  with IO-bound or CPU-bound batches that benefit from locality.
- Emit per-group interleave/sequential decisions with telemetry.

S3-FIFO ghost cache (hostcall_queue.rs + hostcall_s3_fifo.rs):
- Replace VecDeque<String> + BTreeSet<String> ghost queue with
  generation-keyed BTreeMap<u64, K> + BTreeMap<K, u64> lookup.
  This eliminates O(n) position scans on ghost hit/eviction,
  reducing worst-case ghost operations from O(n) to O(log n).
- Ghost eviction now pops the lowest generation key from BTreeMap
  instead of scanning a VecDeque front.
- consume_ghost_hit() removes by generation key directly.
- BTreeSet import moved to #[cfg(test)] only.

Scheduler (scheduler.rs):
- Replace BinaryHeap<Reverse<Macrotask>> with VecDeque<Macrotask>
  for the macrotask queue. Since macrotasks are always enqueued in
  monotone sequence order, a FIFO queue is sufficient and avoids
  heap overhead.
- Add heap_timer_ids HashSet to track all timer IDs currently in
  the heap, replacing the O(n) linear scan in timer_id_in_use()
  with O(1) HashSet lookup.
- timer_id_in_use() now checks heap_timer_ids instead of iterating
  the entire BinaryHeap.

Superinstructions (hostcall_superinstructions.rs):
- Track next_valid index in window collection to avoid overlapping
  windows when multiple superinstruction patterns match adjacent
  hostcall sequences.
- Refactor bool_from_env() to use explicit match for clearer
  default handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
